additionalInfo.description: nếu không thấy log lên đây khi bật debug thì khả năng cao là HC chưa gửi pairMode lên,

configuration.jsScript:
function nextRelation(metadata, msg) {
    var out_list = [];
    switch (msg.method) {
        case "registerHC":
            out_list = ['registerHC']
            break;
            
        case "startScan":
        case "stopScan":
            out_list = ['deviceScan']
            break;
            
        case "log":
            out_list = ['log']
            break;
        case "delDeviceWifi":            
        case "resetHc":
            out_list = ['resetHc']
            break;
            
        case "getHcInfo":
            out_list = ['getHcInfo']
            break;

        case "createRoom":
        case "addDevToRoom":
        case "delDevFromRoom":
        case "delRoom":
        case "updateRoomName":
            out_list = ['roomMessage']
            break;
            
        case "createScene":
        case "controlScene":
        case "editScene":
        case "delScene":
        case "updateSceneName":
        case "addDevToScene":
        case "delDevFromScene":
        case "createSceneController":
        case "delSceneController":
        case "createSceneRspComplete":
        case "editSceneRspComplete":
        case "addDevToSceneRspComplete":
        case "delDevFromSceneRspComplete":
            out_list = ['sceneMessage']
            break;
            
        case "createGroup":
        case "controlGroup":
        case "addDevToGroup":
        case "delDevFromGroup":
        case "delGroup":
        case "updateGroupName":
        case "createGroupRspComplete":
        case "addDevToGroupRspComplete":
        case "delDevFromGroupRspComplete":
            out_list = ['groupMessage']
            break;
            
        case "createRule":
        case "editRule":
        case "delRule":
        case "actionRule":
        case "activeRule":
            out_list = ['ruleMessage']
            break;
        
        case "deviceUpdate":
        case "controlDev":
        case "controlAllDev":
        case "controlListDev":
            
        case "newDev":
        case "getDevStt":
        case "updateDeviceName":
        case "delDev":
        
        case "configOutputControl":
        case "startScanChildDev":
        case "stopScanChildDev":        
            out_list = ['deviceMessage']
            break;
            
        default:
            out_list = ['otherMethod']
            break;
    }
    return out_list;
}
return nextRelation(metadata, msg);
return {msg: msg, metadata: metadata, msgType: msgType};
configuration.tbelScript: return {msg: msg, metadata: metadata, msgType: msgType};
